greeting.text: Ho there, soldier. What do you need?

2.text: Any news from the front lines?

news.text: The dragon's forces grow stronger each day. We lost three scouts near the Frostbite Tundra last week.

advice.text: Fire won't work on ice revenants, but they're slow. Time your strikes carefully, and always carry potions!

lore.text: This was once a proud barracks. Now look at it... The dragon's attack came without warning. We're all that's left of the royal guard.

survival.text: Pure luck. I was in the armory doing inventory when the first blast hit. By the time I got here, it was already over...

2.text: Show me what supplies you have.
